title: Taiwan overtakes India as world's fifth-largest stock market
description: Taiwan's stock market has now surpassed India's in value. This shift is largely due to a strong performance by Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. The island's market capitalization reached $4.95 trillion. India's market value stands at $4.92 trillion. This development highlights the significant impact of artificial intelligence on global markets and manufacturing hubs.

title: Anthropic co-founder joins Pope Leo to warn against leaving AI in Big Tech’s hands
description: At a rare Vatican gathering on artificial intelligence, Anthropic co-founder Chris Olah warned that AI’s rapid rise could trigger mass job losses and deepen global inequality if left unchecked. Standing alongside Pope Leo, he urged governments, faith leaders and civil society to play a greater role in shaping the technology’s future.
content:
The Vatican became an unlikely stage for one of the tech industry’s most urgent debates on Monday, as Anthropic co-founder Chris Olah warned that artificial intelligence must not be governed solely by Silicon Valley companies.
